bridge_role_upgrade.starting_point: R_c as relation template attachment set

field_meaning.K_role(c): role kernel coordinates available to concept c
field_meaning.sigma_rel(c): relation-lift capacity from the stress field

candidate_equations.bridge_lift: rho_c = G_rel(E_c) = G_rel(f_c, z_c, delta_c, A_c, S_c)
candidate_equations.bridge_admissibility: bridge lift is valid only if sigma_rel(c) stays above the minimum relation threshold
candidate_equations.family_anchor_condition: relation lift must remain inside the family-conditioned object-relation overlap band

mathematical_meaning.core_statement: Bridge-role structure should be generated from inventory entries rather than built as a separate symbolic module.
mathematical_meaning.formation_answer: A concept first exists as an object entry, then relation templates and role kernels are lifted from that entry through restricted object-relation overlaps.
mathematical_meaning.runtime_answer: Bridge-role dynamics are inventory-conditioned and stress-gated, not free-floating.

verdict.core_answer: The inventory can now be extended to parameterize bridge-role lift and role kernel generation.
verdict.next_theory_target: connect this bridge-role lift to engineering B-line and to brain-side relational probe design
